---
title: "Reading Workshop on Digital Competition & Regulation"
subtitle: |
  June 12 & 13, 2026

  [Henley Business School](https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=Henley+Business+School+Whiteknights+Campus+Reading+RG6+6UD), Room G10 | University of Reading
  
  <span class="support-line">With support from the British Academy</span>
date: today
language:
  title-block-published: "Programme Version"
format:
  html:
    css: style.css
---

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Day 1: Friday, June 12, 2026

::: {.schedule-item}
::: {.time-col}
[08:30 – 08:55]{.time-badge}
:::
::: {.content-col}
::: {.event-card .coffee}
<span class="event-icon">☕</span>
<div>
  <p class="event-title">Coffee and Registration</p>
</div>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.schedule-item}
::: {.time-col}
[08:55 – 09:00]{.time-badge}
:::
::: {.content-col}
::: {.event-card}
<span class="event-icon">🗣️</span>
<div>
  <p class="event-title">Welcome</p>
</div>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.schedule-item}
::: {.time-col}
[09:00 – 10:30]{.time-badge}
:::
::: {.content-col}
<p class="session-title">Session 1: Information, AI, and Platform Quality</p>

::: {.talk-list}
::: {.talk-item}
::: {.talk-meta}
[Antonio Russo]{.speaker} ([IMT Business School]{.affiliation}) [09:00 – 09:30]{.talk-time}
:::
::: {.talk-title}
AI Summaries and Content Discovery
:::
:::

::: {.talk-item}
::: {.talk-meta}
[Wynne Lam]{.speaker} ([University of Edinburgh]{.affiliation}) [09:30 – 10:00]{.talk-time}
:::
::: {.talk-title}
Innovation and Platform Information Disclosure
:::
:::

::: {.talk-item}
::: {.talk-meta}
[Leonardo Madio]{.speaker} ([University of Padova]{.affiliation}) [10:00 – 10:30]{.talk-time}
:::
::: {.talk-title}
Curation with moral hazard: Why platforms host low quality
:::
:::
:::
:::
:::

::: {.schedule-item}
::: {.time-col}
[10:30 – 11:00]{.time-badge}
:::
::: {.content-col}
::: {.event-card .coffee}
<span class="event-icon">☕</span>
<div>
  <p class="event-title">Coffee Break</p>
</div>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.schedule-item}
::: {.time-col}
[11:00 – 12:00]{.time-badge}
:::
::: {.content-col}
<p class="session-title">Session 2: Sectoral Platforms and Price Matching</p>

::: {.talk-list}
::: {.talk-item}
::: {.talk-meta}
[Rhys Williams]{.speaker} ([University of Cambridge]{.affiliation}) [11:00 – 11:30]{.talk-time}
:::
::: {.talk-title}
Never Knowingly Undersold: Do Price Match Guarantees Result in Lower Prices?
:::
:::

::: {.talk-item}
::: {.talk-meta}
[Anna Rita Bennato]{.speaker} ([Loughborough University]{.affiliation}) [11:30 – 12:00]{.talk-time}
:::
::: {.talk-title}
Local Energy for Sale: Pricing and Participation on Energy Trading Platform
:::
:::
:::
:::
:::

::: {.schedule-item}
::: {.time-col}
[12:00 – 13:30]{.time-badge}
:::
::: {.content-col}
::: {.event-card .lunch}
<span class="event-icon">🍽️</span>
<div>
  <p class="event-title">Lunch Break</p>
  <p class="event-desc">Blandfords, <a href="https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=Park+House+University+of+Reading" target="_blank">Park House</a></p>
</div>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.schedule-item}
::: {.time-col}
[13:30 – 13:45]{.time-badge}
:::
::: {.content-col}
<p class="session-title">Policy Keynote</p>

::: {.talk-list}
::: {.talk-item}
::: {.talk-meta}
[Lewis McQuarrie]{.speaker} ([Digital Regulation Cooperation Forum]{.affiliation})
:::
:::
:::
:::
:::

::: {.schedule-item}
::: {.time-col}
[13:45 – 15:15]{.time-badge}
:::
::: {.content-col}
<p class="session-title">Session 3: Open Banking, Smart Data, and Price Discrimination</p>

::: {.talk-list}
::: {.talk-item}
::: {.talk-meta}
[Helen Weeds]{.speaker} ([Charles River Associates and Centre for Competition Policy]{.affiliation}) [13:45 – 14:15]{.talk-time}
:::
::: {.talk-title}
Open Banking Payments: Promoting Competition and Innovation in Retail Payments
:::
:::

::: {.talk-item}
::: {.talk-meta}
[Yiquan Gu]{.speaker} ([University of Reading]{.affiliation}) [14:15 – 14:45]{.talk-time}
:::
::: {.talk-title}
UK’s Smart Data Schemes
:::
::: {.talk-title style="margin-top: 0.5rem;"}
When Data Calls the Tune: Price Personalization and Price Leadership
:::
:::

::: {.talk-item}
::: {.talk-meta}
[Ioana Chioveanu]{.speaker} ([Nottingham University Business School]{.affiliation}) [14:45 – 15:15]{.talk-time}
:::
::: {.talk-title}
Price Discrimination Under Asymmetric Access to Consumer Data
:::
:::
:::
:::
:::

::: {.schedule-item}
::: {.time-col}
[15:15 – 15:45]{.time-badge}
:::
::: {.content-col}
::: {.event-card .coffee}
<span class="event-icon">☕</span>
<div>
  <p class="event-title">Coffee Break</p>
</div>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.schedule-item}
::: {.time-col}
[15:45 – 17:15]{.time-badge}
:::
::: {.content-col}
<p class="session-title">Session 4: Retail Coordination, Platform Services, and Encroachment</p>

::: {.talk-list}
::: {.talk-item}
::: {.talk-meta}
[Nicolas de Roos]{.speaker} ([University of Liverpool]{.affiliation}) [15:45 – 16:15]{.talk-time}
:::
::: {.talk-title}
Negotiating Coordination: A Study in Retail Gasoline
:::
:::

::: {.talk-item}
::: {.talk-meta}
[Shiva Shekhar]{.speaker} ([Tilburg University]{.affiliation}) [16:15 – 16:45]{.talk-time}
:::
::: {.talk-title}
Data Regulation, Platform Encroachment, and the Matthew Effect
:::
:::

::: {.talk-item}
::: {.talk-meta}
[Greg Taylor]{.speaker} ([University of Oxford]{.affiliation}) [16:45 – 17:15]{.talk-time}
:::
::: {.talk-title}
Seller-Side Tying of Platform Services
:::
:::
:::
:::
:::

::: {.schedule-item}
::: {.time-col}
[17:30]{.time-badge}
:::
::: {.content-col}
::: {.event-card .dinner}
<span class="event-icon">🥤</span>
<div>
  <p class="event-title">Drinks Reception</p>
  <p class="event-desc"><a href="https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=Park+House+University+of+Reading" target="_blank">Park House</a></p>
</div>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.schedule-item}
::: {.time-col}
[19:00]{.time-badge}
:::
::: {.content-col}
::: {.event-card .dinner}
<span class="event-icon">🍽️</span>
<div>
  <p class="event-title">Workshop Dinner</p>
  <p class="event-desc"><a href="https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=Cote+Brasserie+Reading" target="_blank">Côte Reading</a></p>
</div>
:::
:::
:::

## Day 2: Saturday, June 13, 2026

::: {.schedule-item}
::: {.time-col}
[08:30 – 09:00]{.time-badge}
:::
::: {.content-col}
::: {.event-card .coffee}
<span class="event-icon">☕</span>
<div>
  <p class="event-title">Coffee and Registration</p>
</div>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.schedule-item}
::: {.time-col}
[09:00 – 10:30]{.time-badge}
:::
::: {.content-col}
<p class="session-title">Session 5: Data infrastructure, Health, and Privacy</p>

::: {.talk-list}
::: {.talk-item}
::: {.talk-meta}
[Luca Sandrini]{.speaker} ([University of Padova and ZEW Mannheim]{.affiliation}) [09:00 – 09:30]{.talk-time}
:::
::: {.talk-title}
Agglomeration and Strategic Congestion in Data Centers
:::
:::

::: {.talk-item}
::: {.talk-meta}
[Burkhard Hehenkamp]{.speaker} ([Paderborn University]{.affiliation}) [09:30 – 10:00]{.talk-time}
:::
::: {.talk-title}
Sustainable hospital regulation: On the welfare implications of digital treatments
:::
:::

::: {.talk-item}
::: {.talk-meta}
[Stefano Colombo]{.speaker} ([Università Cattolica del Sacro Cuore]{.affiliation}) [10:00 – 10:30]{.talk-time}
:::
::: {.talk-title}
Strategic anonymity and behavior-based pricing
:::
:::
:::
:::
:::

::: {.schedule-item}
::: {.time-col}
[10:30 – 11:00]{.time-badge}
:::
::: {.content-col}
::: {.event-card .coffee}
<span class="event-icon">☕</span>
<div>
  <p class="event-title">Coffee Break</p>
</div>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.schedule-item}
::: {.time-col}
[11:00 – 12:00]{.time-badge}
:::
::: {.content-col}
<p class="session-title">Keynote</p>

::: {.talk-list}
::: {.talk-item}
::: {.talk-meta}
[Andrew Rhodes]{.speaker} ([TSE]{.affiliation}) [11:00 – 12:00]{.talk-time}
:::
::: {.talk-title}
Digital Ecosystems and Data Regulation
:::
:::
:::
:::
:::

::: {.schedule-item}
::: {.time-col}
[12:00 – 13:15]{.time-badge}
:::
::: {.content-col}
::: {.event-card .lunch}
<span class="event-icon">🍽️</span>
<div>
  <p class="event-title">Lunch Break</p>
  <p class="event-desc">HBS Foyer</p>
</div>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.schedule-item}
::: {.time-col}
[13:15 – 14:45]{.time-badge}
:::
::: {.content-col}
<p class="session-title">Session 6: Algorithms, Steering, and Data Markets</p>

::: {.talk-list}
::: {.talk-item}
::: {.talk-meta}
[Subhasish Modak Chowdhury]{.speaker} ([University of Sheffield]{.affiliation}) [13:15 – 13:45]{.talk-time}
:::
::: {.talk-title}
Default Search Engine Settings and Consumer Switch Behaviour: Results from a Field Experiment
:::
:::

::: {.talk-item}
::: {.talk-meta}
[Muxin Li]{.speaker} ([Fudan University]{.affiliation}) [13:45 – 14:15]{.talk-time}
:::
::: {.talk-title}
Demand Steering and Market Selection: Vertical Contracts and Algorithmic Allocation
:::
:::

::: {.talk-item}
::: {.talk-meta}
[Tobias Wenzel]{.speaker} ([DICE]{.affiliation}) [14:15 – 14:45]{.talk-time}
:::
::: {.talk-title}
Mandating privacy spillovers: Interoperability in data markets
:::
:::
:::
:::
:::

::: {.schedule-item}
::: {.time-col}
[14:45]{.time-badge}
:::
::: {.content-col}
::: {.event-card}
<span class="event-icon">🗣️</span>
<div>
  <p class="event-title">Concluding Thanks</p>
</div>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.schedule-item}
::: {.time-col}
[15:00]{.time-badge}
:::
::: {.content-col}
::: {.event-card .coffee}
<span class="event-icon">🥤</span>
<div>
  <p class="event-title">Post-workshop Drinks</p>
  <p class="event-desc"><a href="https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=Park+House+University+of+Reading" target="_blank">Park House</a></p>
</div>
:::
:::
:::

:::
